name: Demon Lord
phrases: KNEEL before my throne
i command the depths...the burning deep
your soul belongs to me now
tax day already?
I rule shadow and flame alike
brimstone rises at my whisper
you will serve me in the eternal pit
*sighs* — another fool to destroy
I am your doom, incarnate
cower, little mortal
my crown drinks the blood of worlds
I've crushed a thousand realms
your screams...they amuse me
hell itself trembles when I speak
obey or suffer beyond measure
I am darkness made manifest
Does this robe make me look fat?
you cannot escape my wrath
legions answer to my command
*grumbles* — minions never RSVP to conquest
your strength is nothing...less than nothing
witness the power of the abyss
step into my pyre...if you dare
I have devoured your kind before
shadows spread across the world at my feet
surrender now and I'll make it quick
I am eternal. I am absolute. I am INEVITABLE.
the fires of hell dance only for me
your burning world awaits my judgment
I smell your pathetic fear...and I LOVE it
